content:
type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Finished sort_palette feature: quantize(..., sort_palette=None) with 'luminance'/'rgb' options, helper _sort_palette reorders palette and remaps pixel indices via existing remap_palette-style trick, correctly handles RGB and RGBA palettes; all tests pass
